candidate_definitions.text: A demo app that runs librespot-java on Android

This is a demo application to demonstrate that it is possible to run [librespot-java](https://github.com/librespot-org/librespot-java) on an Android device. The app provides basic functionalities to login and then to play a custom URI, pause/resume, skip next and previous, but a…
A module for MagicMirror displaying the song currently streaming on your librespot java speaker.
I no longer own a Magic Mirror, so I'm not maintaining this anymore. Last time I used it in 2021, it worked fine.
